647447b00604.en: Experienced Software Engineer specializing in \textbf{Python/Django}, REST APIs, and scalable architectures. Proven at integrating complex systems (OpenAI, Google, LinkedIn, Gekata APIs), designing data pipelines, and applying strong mathematical reasoning to deliver robust solutions.

Имею опыт интеграции сложных систем (OpenAI, Google, LinkedIn, Gekata API), разработки конвейеров данных и применения глубокой математической базы для создания надёжных решений.

d574aa405dbb.en: \textbf{Introdex}: Integrated Google, LinkedIn, and other APIs; optimized search by normalizing and indexing legacy database, search speed went down from 5-7 second to under 300ms.

dca20e487a58.en: \textbf{AI Vendor Discovery Agent}: Engineered a Django-based chatbot using Llama 3 with custom tool-calling capabilities to automate vendor matching and complex database queries via Telegram or WhatsApp.
